Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Candle Bay Imperial Prison]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Calder's father is locked in Candle Bay Imperial Prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — The Candle Bay Imperial Prison is an Imperial Prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — The Candle Bay Imperial Prison is a location that has turned Calder away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — The reception room of Candle Bay Imperial Prison is small, cramped, and decorated almost entirely in white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jerri enters the Candle Bay Imperial Prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Calder found himself on the rocks beneath Candle Bay Imperial Prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — The Candle Bay Imperial Prison was torn open by the Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Calder Marten broke his father out of the Candle Bay Imperial Prison.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Candle Bay Imperial Prison is a location where Fletcher served as warden.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — The Candle Bay Imperial Prison is in ruins.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Candle Bay Imperial Prison has just reopened.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
